hero.title: AI short drama platform foundation
hero.description: The shared project structure, base configuration, and application shell are in place. Login, workspace, template library, and generation workflows can build on this foundation.

preview.title: Theme preview
preview.description: These shadcn-style components follow light, dark, and brand theme changes.

aiCreation.title: AI creation
aiCreation.description: Reserves the entry points for script generation, storyboard breakdown, and short drama production.

textToDrama.title: Text to drama
textToDrama.description: Keeps the core workspace shell first, with business forms and generation flows to be added later.

assetManagement.title: Asset management
assetManagement.description: Reserves module boundaries for drama projects, materials, and templates.

settings.semanticColorDescription: Card, Tabs, Badge, Button, and Switch use semantic colors.
